model_comparison:
Both models achieved perfect scores for content accuracy and fluency. The decisive factor is the paralinguistic compliance with the command "圆润的音质" (mellow/rounded sound quality), where a significant difference is observed.

Model 1 generated a high-quality, polite female voice, but its timbre is bright and crisp, which does not align with the "mellow/rounded" request. It seems to have defaulted to a standard pleasant voice without capturing the specific texture required.

Model 2, on the other hand, precisely interpreted and executed the command. The generated male voice is audibly mellow, resonant, and full-bodied, perfectly embodying the requested sound quality. The lower pitch and warm tone are an excellent representation of "圆润".

This constitutes a significant difference in feature control capability. Model 2 is the clear winner as it successfully synthesized the specific audio characteristic requested, whereas Model 1 failed to do so.
